results.title: CADAM: AI Tinkercad | Product Hunt
results.content:
What do you think? …

Zach Dive
CADAM

CADAM

Hey Product Hunt! I'm Zach from Adam We're building AI agents for mechanical CAD software.   
  
We’ve built the company on two fundamental beliefs:  
  
- AI will be the primary medium for creating mechanical designs just like it is in software today.  
- The best paradigm for CAD generation is to generate CAD as code (text -> code -> CAD).  
  
CADAM is our open source Text to CAD platform, for makers. Think of it like AI TinkerCAD!  
  
This is a companion to our flagship app (), which is a dedicated workspace for more professional workflows.  
  
Feel free to leave questions or thoughts in the comments [...] CADAM

It drove me to pull my first all-nighter and start teaching myself how to code. 16 years later, I think we’ve found a way to make a voice experience delightful for all-day use.
